TestCase z21Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data, t1.data, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data = follow_case_data;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to work with
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Operation: reverse subarray between two random indices
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (idx1 > idx2) {
        int tmp = idx1;
        idx1 = idx2;
        idx2 = tmp;
    }
    while (idx1 < idx2) {
        double tmp = follow_case.data[idx1];
        follow_case.data[idx1] = follow_case.data[idx2];
        follow_case.data[idx2] = tmp;
        ++idx1;
        --idx2;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
